category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a command-line tool to put Macs to sleep.
display_name_sources: source_facts.executables lists Zzz and source_facts.homepage points to the official Orc/Zzz repository.
source_facts.name gives the package name zzz.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both identify the official GitHub project, whose README is the best documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it puts Macs to sleep from the command line.
source_facts.executables lists Zzz as the command executable.
